creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems we need to delete two files from INFO. Would you mind checking it?

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
ls: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/lilypond/work/stage/usr/local/share/info/internals.info*: No such file or directory
ls: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/lilypond/work/stage/usr/local/share/info/lilypond-web.info*: No such file or directory
